economic_notes: Nation has economic development corporation, casino interest (1/6 of Aseneskak Casino), fuel station, cafe, business centre, and limited partnership entities. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Audit is a DISCLAIMER OF OPINION (not merely qualified) due to significant internal control weaknesses across cash, accounts receivable, inventory, long-term investments, tangible capital assets, accounts payable, payroll, revenue, expenditures, and capital projects. Financial statements are noted as UNAUDITED in notes. Fiscal year 2020 audit report dated April 29, 2022 — over two years late. 7 entities fully consolidated including housing, health, employment, daycare, and trust entities. 6 entities on modified equity basis including casino interest and commercial LPs. ISC had previously identified $470,277 in recoverable amounts from pre-2001. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event. No remuneration schedule included.
